name: pm-claude-skills
description: PM stands for Professional, not just Product Management. 466 Claude Skills + 4 agent templates across 66 bundles covering 27 professions — engineering, security, AI/ML, customer success, legal, government & policy, finance, personal finance, HR, sales, design, Figma, marketing, social media, writers, developer relations, founders/startups, healthcare, nonprofit, crisis comms, educators, content creators, and more. Built by a PM, used by everyone. Building blocks for the Anthropic agent template architecture.

plugins.name: pm-warroom
plugins.description: The adversarial bundle — skills that attack your work before reality does: Premortem Assassin, Devil's Twin, Metric Gaslighting Detector, Decision Autopsy, Assumption Bounty.

plugins.name: pm-method
plugins.description: Process discipline for professional work — the difference between an agent that produces output and one that produces outcomes. Interview the requester before building, brainstorm divergent-then-convergent, write and execute real plans, verify before declaring done, orchestrate subagents, work incrementally, and simplify what you built.

plugins.name: pm-aiwork
plugins.description: Working with AI, organisation-side: the questions every manager is asking this year. Audit whether the AI spend paid, redesign roles AI has changed, write a usable AI policy, review performance when output is AI-assisted, and clear the slop out of your content.

plugins.name: pm-agentnative
plugins.description: Build for the agent era: products are getting non-human users. Spec an MCP server properly, audit whether agents can actually use your product, migrate seat pricing before agents break it, design human-in-the-loop approval surfaces, and get voice agents right.

plugins.name: pm-vision
plugins.description: Vision-first skills: point a camera or screenshot at the work and get the structured artifact — whiteboard photos become specs, competitor screenshots become teardowns, slide photos become board pre-reads, chart images become data tables. Built for multimodal models (Fable 5, Sonnet, Gemini); attach images in the playground or paste them in Claude Code.

plugins.name: pm-agentops
plugins.description: Operate AI agents and LLM features in production: prompt regression suites, model migration plans, context-engineering reviews, agent incident postmortems, and observability specs — plus the pm-ai evaluation and cost skills they build on.

plugins.name: pm-autopilot
plugins.description: Put recurring rituals on autopilot: charter what to automate, schedule it on any runner (Claude Code routines, cron, n8n, GitHub Actions), and make every run delta-aware so it reports what changed, not what it already said. Ships with the recurring skills worth scheduling.

plugins.name: pm-security
plugins.description: Hands-on application & operational security skills: Threat Model (STRIDE), Security Review, Vulnerability Triage (CVSS), Security Incident Response, and Pentest Report. Defensive security and authorized testing for systems you own or are permitted to assess.

plugins.name: pm-gov
plugins.description: Government & public-policy skills: RFP Response, Policy Memo, Public Comment, Briefing Note, FOIA Request, and Regulatory Impact Analysis. For public servants, GovTech vendors, and policy teams — drafting aids, not legal advice.

plugins.name: pm-pmm
plugins.description: Product Marketing skills: Win/Loss Analysis, Sales Enablement, Pricing-Page Copy, Analyst Relations, Customer Advisory Boards, Voice of Customer, Launch Tiering, and Demo Scripts. Turn product value into messaging, enablement, and launches that land.

plugins.name: pm-craft
plugins.description: Engineering craft & process discipline for working with coding agents: TDD Workflow, Bug Diagnosis, Refactoring Plan, Session Handoff, PR Description, and Code Review Guide. How to work, not just what to ship.

plugins.name: pm-money
plugins.description: Personal-finance skills for individuals: Budget Builder, Debt Payoff Plan, Investing Policy Statement, Net Worth Statement, Savings Goal Plan, and Expense Audit. Educational planning aids — not regulated financial advice.

plugins.name: pm-devrel
plugins.description: Developer-relations & open-source maintainer skills: Launch Post (Show HN/Product Hunt), Docs Quickstart, Conference Talk Proposal, Changelog Writer, README Writer, and Contributor Guide. Ship and grow developer tools and OSS projects.

plugins.name: pm-realestate
plugins.description: Real-estate skills for agents, buyers, and investors: Property Listing, Comparative Market Analysis, Property Offer Letter, Property Investment Analysis, Open House Plan, and Tenant Screening Guide. Market, price, and evaluate property — Fair-Housing-aware drafting aids, not legal advice.

plugins.name: pm-qa
plugins.description: QA & testing skills: Test Case Writer, Bug Report, Exploratory Test Charter, Regression Test Plan, QA Release Sign-off, and API Test Plan. Find bugs early and ship with evidence, not vibes.

plugins.name: pm-visuals
plugins.description: Turn ideas into visuals: Flowchart, Architecture Diagram, User Journey Map, Org Chart, Sequence Diagram, Mind Map, Gantt Roadmap, ER Diagram, and Chart (bar/line/pie) — plus Announcement & Quote cards. Diagram & chart skills render live in the playground and export to PNG/SVG.

plugins.name: pm-localization
plugins.description: Translation & localization skills: Professional Translator, Transcreation, Localization Brief, Subtitle & Caption, Glossary Builder, and i18n Readiness Review. Reach every market — translation as a real job, not word-for-word.

plugins.name: pm-accounting
plugins.description: Accounting & bookkeeping skills for finance ops and small businesses: Invoice Generator, Expense Policy, Collections Email, Financial Statement Explainer, Bookkeeping Categorization, and Cash Flow Forecast. Practical money admin — drafting aids, not tax/accounting advice.

plugins.name: pm-recruiting
plugins.description: Recruiting & talent-sourcing skills: Boolean Search Builder, Recruiter Outreach, Interview Question Bank, Candidate Scorecard, Offer Letter, and Sourcing Strategy. Source, assess, and close candidates — structured and fair.

plugins.name: pm-uxwriting
plugins.description: UX writing & content design skills: Microcopy Writer, Error Message Writer, Empty State Writer, Product Naming, Content Style Guide, and Onboarding Copy. The small words that make a product clear, usable, and on-voice.

plugins.name: pm-ecommerce
plugins.description: E-commerce & retail skills that sell: Product Description, Marketplace Listing Optimizer, Return & Refund Policy, Promotion Plan, Review Response, and Category Page Brief. Listings that rank and convert, promos with the margin math, and reviews handled well.

plugins.name: pm-support
plugins.description: Support & customer-ops skills: Support Macro, Help-Center Article, CSAT/NPS Analysis (with an NPS calculator), Support Runbook, Escalation Tree, and KB Audit. For frontline support, CX, and success teams.

plugins.name: pm-consulting
plugins.description: Consulting & freelance skills: Consulting Proposal, Statement of Work, Client Discovery, Case Study Write-up, Rate Card, and Engagement Retro. Win, scope, deliver, and grow client work — pairs with the themed PDF export.

plugins.name: pm-dataeng
plugins.description: Analytics-engineering skills: dbt Model Spec, Data Contract, Metric Semantic Layer, Experiment Readout (with a stdlib significance calculator), SQL Optimizer, and Data Quality Checks.

plugins.name: pm-documents
plugins.description: Produce real, editable Office files (not markdown): Excel Model (live formulas), Slide Deck (.pptx), and Word Document (.docx). Generated via openpyxl / python-pptx / python-docx — needs a code-execution environment (Claude Code, API code tool, or Claude.ai).

plugins.name: pm-comms
plugins.description: Communication & influence skills everyone needs: Difficult Conversation, Giving Feedback, Managing Up, Executive Presence, Saying No, and a Persuasion Brief. The soft skills that decide careers.

plugins.name: pm-crisis
plugins.description: Crisis & sensitive communications skills for high-stakes moments: PR Crisis Response, Incident Public Statement, Customer Outage Notice, Layoff Communication, and Apology Letter.

plugins.name: pm-health
plugins.description: Healthcare documentation skills for clinicians and health teams (drafting aids for clinician review, not medical advice): SOAP Note, Discharge Summary, Prior Authorization Letter, and Clinical Trial Protocol.

plugins.name: pm-lifeadmin
plugins.description: Life-admin letters that get results: Complaint Letter, Dispute Letter, Reference Letter, Rental Application, and Insurance Claim. The everyday correspondence everyone needs, done well.

plugins.name: pm-calculators
plugins.description: Executable business calculators & models — each ships a stdlib script: Unit Economics (LTV/CAC), SaaS Metrics (NRR/quick ratio), Runway (default alive/dead), Pricing, ROI/NPV — plus computed models that emit real .xlsx with live formulas: cohort curve fitting (LTV), Monte Carlo runway (P10/P50/P90), and Van Westendorp pricing. Verifiable math, not vibes.

plugins.name: pm-copy
plugins.description: Copywriting & conversion skills: Value Proposition, Landing Page Copy, Sales Page, Ad Copy, Cold Email, Headline Options, and Email Sequence. Words that convert — pairs with the themed PDF export.

plugins.name: pm-jobsearch
plugins.description: Land the job: JD Decoder, Company Brief, Outreach Message, Follow-Up Sequence, and Interview Prep. The active-job-hunt toolkit — pairs with the pm-personal documents (resume, cover letter, LinkedIn) and the Job Search hub.

plugins.name: pm-personal
plugins.description: Personal & professional documents for you: Resume/CV, Cover Letter, Personal Bio, LinkedIn Profile, Portfolio Page, and One-Pager. Pair with the playground's themed PDF export for beautifully typeset output.

plugins.name: pm-career
plugins.description: Career & growth skills for advocating for yourself: Brag Doc, Self-Review, Promotion Packet, 1:1 Prep, Career Ladder Map, and Salary Negotiation (with a total-comp comparison script).

plugins.name: pm-compliance
plugins.description: Compliance & trust skills for regulated and enterprise teams: SOC 2 Readiness, GDPR Compliance, HIPAA Safeguards, ISO 27001 ISMS, Vendor Security Review, and Data Retention Policy. Each ships a stdlib scoring/validation script.

plugins.name: pm-growth
plugins.description: Growth & marketing skills: Marketing Funnel Plan, Lifecycle/CRM Plan, Paid Acquisition Plan, Growth Experiment Backlog, Retention Loop Design, Referral Program Design, Messaging Framework, and Conversion Rate Optimization.

plugins.name: pm-ai
plugins.description: AI/ML engineering skills for shipping AI features responsibly: Model Card, AI Eval Plan, RAG Design Doc, Agent Spec, Dataset Datasheet, AI Feature PRD, LLM Cost & Latency Budget, Prompt Optimizer, Eval Rubric Designer, RAG Architecture Review, LLM Guardrails Spec, Agent Design Review, and Model Selection Advisor.

plugins.name: pm-essentials
plugins.description: Core PM skills: PRD Template, Meeting Notes, Stakeholder Update, User Research Synthesis, Competitive Analysis, Word Doc Tracked Changes. The essentials every PM needs first.

plugins.name: pm-discovery
plugins.description: Discovery & research skills: Discovery Interview Guide, Job Story Mapper, User Interview Synthesis, Assumption Mapper, Customer Journey Map. Structure user research from screener to synthesis — including end-to-end journey mapping with touchpoints, emotions, and prioritised opportunities.

plugins.name: pm-planning
plugins.description: Planning & strategy skills: OKR Builder, Feature Prioritisation (RICE/MoSCoW/Kano/ICE), Roadmap Presentation, Pricing Strategy, RICE + Impact Matrix, Roadmap Narrative.

plugins.name: pm-delivery
plugins.description: Sprint & delivery skills: Sprint Planning, Technical Spec, A/B Test Planner, Go-to-Market Planner, Launch Checklist, Sprint Brief, Retro Analysis, PPTX Slide Auditor, User Story Writer, Launch Readiness. Write production-ready user stories with Given/When/Then acceptance criteria, plus a cross-functional pre-launch readiness assessment with an explicit Go / Conditional Go / No-Go recommendation.

plugins.name: pm-analytics
plugins.description: Data & metrics skills: Data Analysis Standard, Retention Analysis, Product Health Analysis. Structure metric deep-dives, funnel analysis, cohort studies and churn investigations.

plugins.name: pm-strategy
plugins.description: Strategy & stakeholder skills: Competitor Signal Tracker, Competitive Intelligence Monitor, Stakeholder Influence Mapper, Strategic Narrative Generator, Executive Update, Ambiguity Resolver.

plugins.name: pm-advanced
plugins.description: Advanced PM skills: AI Product Canvas, Multi-Source Signal Synthesiser, Experiment Designer, Design Handoff Brief, AI Ethics Review. For senior PMs working on complex products — including a structured ethical review framework for AI/ML features covering fairness, transparency, privacy, safety, and accountability.

plugins.name: pm-rituals
plugins.description: Weekly PM ritual skill: PM Weekly Review. A 20-minute structured ritual covering metrics, shipping progress, insights, and next week's top 3 priorities.

plugins.name: pm-gtm
plugins.description: Marketing & GTM skills: Go-To-Market Planner, Content Calendar, Competitor Teardown, Email Campaign, SEO Content Brief, Media Pitch, Social Media Strategy, Product Positioning Doc. Build positioning docs, messaging frameworks, content pillars, social strategies with KPIs, launch campaigns, and journalist pitches.

plugins.name: pm-engineering
plugins.description: Engineering & tech skills: Code Review Checklist, Incident Postmortem, API Docs Writer, Architecture Decision Record, Debugging Log Analyser, PR Description Writer, System Design Interview, Changelog Generator, Test Strategy Doc, Runbook Writer, CI/CD Playbook, SLO & Error Budget, Developer Onboarding Doc, On-Call Runbook, Security Threat Model, Performance Budget, Database Schema Design, Database Migration Plan, Technical Debt Register, RFC Writer, Capacity Planning, Load Testing Plan, Disaster Recovery Plan, Feature Flag Guide, Dependency Audit, Service Catalog Entry, Monitoring Setup Guide, Local Dev Setup, API Versioning Strategy, Infra-as-Code Review, Engineering Weekly Report, Tech Radar, Sprint Velocity Analysis, Microservices Decomposition, Engineering Hiring Rubric, Context Mode, Claude Superpowers, Skill Security Auditor, Error Decoder, Regex Builder, Git Troubleshooter, Dependency Conflict Resolver, Code Explainer, Writing Great Skills. 44 structured skills for engineering teams, SREs, technical PMs, and Claude Code power users — including dev-troubleshooting skills (errors, regex, git, dependencies, code explanation), a security audit for any SKILL.md / system prompt before you install or merge it, and a meta-skill for authoring high-quality skills.

plugins.name: pm-cs
plugins.description: Customer Success skills: Customer Health Scorecard, QBR Deck, Escalation Brief, Churn Analysis, Renewal Playbook, Customer Success Plan. Score health, build QBRs, write escalation briefs, plan renewals with commercial strategy and objection responses, and build joint success plans with milestones and mutual commitments.

plugins.name: pm-data
plugins.description: Data & analytics skills: Metrics Framework, SQL Query Explainer, Dashboard Brief, Chart Data Extractor, Cohort Analysis, Data Pipeline Spec, A/B Test Readout, Metric Tree Builder, Data Quality Audit. Build metric trees, explain SQL, spec dashboards, run cohort retention with LTV modelling, design ETL/ELT pipelines, read out A/B tests with significance and guardrails, and audit datasets for quality before you trust them.

plugins.name: pm-people
plugins.description: Leadership & people skills: Performance Review, Hiring Rubric, Team Offsite Planner, 360-Degree Feedback Template, Team Health Check. Write reviews, build scorecards, run Spotify-model team health assessments, and design 360 feedback surveys with structured narrative reports.

plugins.name: pm-design
plugins.description: Design & UX skills: UX Research Plan, Design Critique, Accessibility Audit, Design System Audit. Create research plans, critique designs using JTBD and Gestalt principles, audit for WCAG 2.2 compliance, and audit design systems for component coverage, token consistency, and adoption health.

plugins.name: pm-business
plugins.description: Business, strategy & C-suite skills: Investor Update, Board Deck Narrative, Board Pre-Read, Decision Memo, Strategy Memo, Capital Allocation, Job Application. Drive decisions with crisp memos, run board meetings on pre-reads, allocate budget by return × strategic fit, and articulate a real strategy with explicit non-goals.

plugins.name: pm-legal
plugins.description: Legal skills: Contract Review, NDA Analyser, Legal Brief, Compliance Checklist, Privacy Policy Drafter, Demand Letter, Clause Explainer. Flag risks in contracts and NDAs, draft legal memos in IRAC format, generate GDPR/SOC 2/FCA compliance checklists, draft plain-language privacy policies and demand letters, and decode any contract clause. Not a substitute for qualified legal advice.

plugins.name: pm-founders
plugins.description: Founder & startup skills: Startup Idea Validator, Fundraising FAQ, Cap Table Explainer, Founder-Market Fit, Investor Cold Email, Runway Planner. Pressure-test an idea, prep for investor Q&A, explain dilution and SAFEs, articulate why-you/why-now, write outreach that gets replies, and decide when to raise. Not legal or financial advice.

plugins.name: pm-education
plugins.description: Educator skills: Lesson Plan, Rubric Builder, Quiz Generator, Parent Communication, IEP Goal Support, Student Feedback. Build standards-aligned lessons with differentiation, fair grading rubrics, quizzes with answer keys, warm parent messages, measurable SMART IEP goals, and constructive feedback that tells students how to improve. A drafting aid for teachers — not legal advice.

plugins.name: pm-creator
plugins.description: Content creator skills: Content Repurposer, Hook Writer, Short-Form Script, Newsletter Writer, Creator Brand Kit, Creator Media Kit. Atomize one piece into a multi-platform pack (thread, LinkedIn, newsletter, carousel, Reel), write scroll-stopping hooks, script TikToks/Reels/Shorts, draft newsletter issues, define your niche/voice/pillars, and land sponsorships. The craft layer of the creator stack — pairs with the ContentGoldMine app for one-click automation.

plugins.name: pm-finance
plugins.description: Finance skills: Financial Model Narrative, Budget Variance Analysis, Investor Pitch Deck, Financial Due Diligence, Tax Planning Checklist. Turn numbers into board-ready narratives, explain variances, structure pitch decks, generate DD checklists, and review year-end tax planning opportunities.

plugins.name: pm-hr
plugins.description: HR skills: Job Description Writer, Onboarding Plan, Employee Engagement Survey, Redundancy Consultation, Change Management Plan. Write inclusive JDs, build 30/60/90-day plans, design engagement surveys, structure redundancy processes, and manage organisational change with stakeholder analysis and adoption metrics.

plugins.name: pm-sales
plugins.description: Sales skills: Sales Battlecard, Discovery Call Prep, Proposal Writer, Account Plan, Sales Forecasting Model, Partnership Proposal. Build battlecards, prepare calls, write proposals, create account plans, build forecasts, and structure B2B partnership proposals with mutual value, commercial terms, and joint GTM plans.

plugins.name: pm-operations
plugins.description: Operations & procurement skills: Process Documentation, SOP Writer, Vendor Evaluation, RFP Writer, Vendor Contract Checklist, Project Status Report, Workshop Facilitation Guide, Risk Register, RACI Matrix, Email Triage, Morning Intelligence. Document workflows, write SOPs and RFPs, review vendor contracts, build risk registers, define RACI matrices, triage your inbox, and auto-generate a morning news brief.

plugins.name: pm-nonprofit
plugins.description: Nonprofit fundraising & stewardship skills: Impact Report, Case for Support, and Donor Update. Show funders what their giving achieved and keep supporters close.

plugins.name: pm-research
plugins.description: Research and healthcare skills: Clinical Case Summary, Research Protocol, Patient Communication, Literature Review. Write SBAR handovers, design research protocols, draft accessible patient communications, and structure literature reviews.

plugins.name: pm-cross
plugins.description: Cross-profession skills: Press Release, Grant Proposal, Executive Summary, Teaching Lesson Plan, Sycophancy Challenger, Last 30 Days Research, NotebookLM Connector, Professional Brain, Action Runner. Get genuine push-back on your ideas, gather multi-platform research, automate NotebookLM — plus the Professional Brain: a durable local memory skills read & write back (provenance-tagged), and Action Runner to execute a skill's recommendations (open tickets, post updates) safely behind a dry-run approval gate.

plugins.name: pm-figma
plugins.description: Figma skills for PMs and designers: Component Audit, Design Brief, Annotation Guide, Design Review, User Flow Planner, Variant Matrix, Spacing System, Prototype Plan, Design QA, PM Design Critique. Work smarter across the full Figma design lifecycle.

plugins.name: pm-social
plugins.description: Social Media skills: Social Media Audit, Influencer Brief, Community Management Playbook, Social Ad Campaign, Viral Content Framework. Score your social presence, brief influencer partnerships, manage communities at scale, plan paid social campaigns with full ad copy, and build a repeatable system for shareable content.

plugins.name: pm-writers
plugins.description: Writers & Content Creators skills: Instagram Post Downloader, AEO Optimizer, Thumbnail Creator, Substack Notes Scraper, Notes Humanizer, YouTube Script Writer. Download Instagram carousels as PDFs, restructure articles for AI citation, generate thumbnail candidates via Gemini, export Substack Notes analytics to Excel, strip AI writing patterns from any text, and write retention-optimized YouTube scripts with hooks and visual/audio cues.
